name: GitHub Copilot CLI
description: GitHub's autonomous coding agent that runs in your terminal with agentic workflows beyond just a chat interface. Generally available for all paid Copilot subscribers, it understands code and GitHub context, supports multiple AI models, and provides terminal-native development experience.
community_quotes: Agentic development in your terminal
More than just a chat interface
Available for all paid Copilot subscribers
Terminal-native development with AI agent

name: JetBrains Air
description: An agentic development environment for delegating coding tasks to multiple AI agents and running them concurrently. Built on JetBrains' 26 years of experience, Air integrates tools around the agent rather than the code editor, featuring the Agent Client Protocol (ACP) for extensibility.
community_quotes: JetBrains believes agents are changing how software is made
Air is designed to delegate tasks to multiple AI agents running concurrently
Built on the foundation of JetBrains' abandoned Fleet project
A new wave of dev tooling built on 26 years of experience
Agent Client Protocol (ACP) open for extensibility

name: Junie CLI
description: JetBrains' standalone AI coding agent CLI that previously could only be used as an IDE extension. Makes the Junie AI agent fully standalone with support for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Grok models. Costs from $10/month for individuals, supports macOS, Linux, and Windows.
community_quotes: Makes Junie AI agent fully standalone
Previously only available as IDE extension
Supports multiple AI model providers
Junie can run code and tests to reduce warnings and compilation errors

name: Anthropic Claude Code Review
description: A multi-agent code review system for Claude Code that automatically analyzes AI-generated code in pull requests, flags logic errors, and checks code quality. Dispatches teams of AI reviewers to examine PRs with depth and suggest fixes, designed to handle the flood of AI-generated code.
community_quotes: Multi-agent system that dispatches teams of AI reviewers
Designed to handle the flood of AI-generated code
Automatically reviews pull requests for bugs and logic errors
Dispatches parallel code review agents to catch bugs

name: Databricks Genie Code
description: An autonomous AI agent that brings 'agentic engineering' to data work. Doubled the success rate of leading coding agents on real-world data tasks, with 80% of new databases on Databricks being created with Genie Code. Can build pipelines, debug failures, ship dashboards, and maintain production systems.
community_quotes: Brings agentic engineering to data work
Doubled the success rate of leading coding agents
80% of new databases created with Genie Code
Can build pipelines, debug failures, and maintain production systems
